dimensions.name: skills_match
dimensions.label: Skills Match
dimensions.description: How well the candidate's technical skills align with required and preferred skills for an AI Engineer (LLMs, RAG, ML frameworks, MLOps, cloud).

scoring_guide.90-100: Covers all required skills + most preferred skills with clear hands-on depth in LLMs/RAG/MLOps
scoring_guide.70-89: Covers all required skills; solid experience with several preferred skills
scoring_guide.50-69: Covers most required skills; limited LLM or production AI experience
scoring_guide.30-49: General ML/software background but missing core AI engineering skills
scoring_guide.0-29: Significant skill gaps — no evidence of LLM or ML experience

dimensions.name: experience
dimensions.label: Relevant Experience
dimensions.description: Years and quality of hands-on AI engineering experience — building and shipping AI/ML systems, not just research or coursework.

scoring_guide.90-100: 5+ years, clear production AI deployments, measurable business impact
scoring_guide.70-89: 3-5 years of relevant experience, shipped at least one production AI system
scoring_guide.50-69: 1-3 years or primarily research/academic AI experience
scoring_guide.30-49: Under 1 year or AI experience limited to side projects

dimensions.name: education
dimensions.label: Education
dimensions.description: Alignment of educational background with AI engineering requirements.

scoring_guide.90-100: MS or PhD in CS, ML, or related field from a strong program
scoring_guide.70-89: BS in CS, Mathematics, or Engineering; or strong bootcamp with AI focus
scoring_guide.50-69: Tangentially related degree (e.g. physics, statistics) with self-study evidence
scoring_guide.30-49: Unrelated degree but strong practical experience compensates

dimensions.name: communication
dimensions.label: Communication & Clarity
dimensions.description: How clearly the resume communicates impact, architecture decisions, and technical depth.

scoring_guide.90-100: Quantified outcomes, clear system descriptions, professional and concise
scoring_guide.50-69: Readable but vague about impact or technical specifics
scoring_guide.30-49: Disorganised, typos, or very sparse descriptions

dimensions.name: overall_fit
dimensions.label: Overall Culture & Role Fit
dimensions.description: General signals of ownership, curiosity, and ability to work at the intersection of research and production.

scoring_guide.90-100: Evidence of independent research, open-source contributions, or AI community involvement
